ddls:
CREATE TABLE "dates" (
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each date */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date */,
  "day_of_week" INTEGER /* Day of the week (1-7) */,
  "day_of_year" INTEGER /* Day of the year (1-365) */,
  "week_of_year" INTEGER /* Week of the year (1-52) */,
  "month_of_year" INTEGER /* Month of the year (1-12) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year */,
  "holiday" INTEGER /* Whether the date is a holiday or special event */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season (e.g., summer, winter, holiday season) */,
  "school_schedule" TEXT /* School schedule (e.g., in session, summer break, winter break) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parks" (
  "park_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each park */,
  "park_name" TEXT /* Name of the park */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the park */,
  "park_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the park */,
  "park_type" TEXT /* Type of park (e.g., theme park, water park, resort) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("park_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* ID of the park the area belongs to */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the area */,
  "area_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the area */,
  "area_type" TEXT /* Type of area (e.g., land, water, indoor, outdoor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_areas_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attractions" (
  "attraction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attraction */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the area the attraction belongs to */,
  "attraction_name" TEXT /* Name of the attraction */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of attraction (e.g., ride, show, exhibit) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the attraction */,
  "attraction_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the attraction */,
  "attraction_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the attraction (e.g., ride time, show length) */,
  "attraction_popularity" TEXT /* Popularity of the attraction (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attraction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attractions_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "date_id" INTEGER /* ID of the date */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* ID of the park */,
  "total_attendance" INTEGER /* Total attendance for the day */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue for the day */,
  "area_attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance for each area */,
  "attraction_attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance for each attraction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_date_id FOREIGN KEY ("date_id") REFERENCES dates ("date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "date_id" INTEGER /* ID of the date */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature (in degrees Fahrenheit) */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity (as a percentage) */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation (in inches) */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Weather condition (e.g., sunny, cloudy, rainy) */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_date_id FOREIGN KEY ("date_id") REFERENCES dates ("date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* ID of the park the staff member belongs to */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., manager, cast member) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "staff_department" TEXT /* Department of the staff member (e.g., operations, maintenance, guest services) */,
  "staff_shift" TEXT /* Shift of the staff member (e.g., morning, afternoon, evening) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scheduling" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule record */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member */,
  "date_id" INTEGER /* ID of the date */,
  "shift_start" TEXT /* Start time of the shift */,
  "shift_end" TEXT /* End time of the shift */,
  "shift_type" TEXT /* Type of shift (e.g., regular, overtime) */,
  "shift_status" TEXT /* Status of the shift (e.g., scheduled, unscheduled, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scheduling_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scheduling_date_id FOREIGN KEY ("date_id") REFERENCES dates ("date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "date_id" INTEGER /* ID of the date */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., holiday, concert, festival) */,
  "event_attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_date_id FOREIGN KEY ("date_id") REFERENCES dates ("date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wait_times" (
  "wait_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wait time record */,
  "attraction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attraction */,
  "date_id" INTEGER /* ID of the date */,
  "wait_time" REAL /* Average wait time for the attraction */,
  "wait_time_category" TEXT /* Category of wait time (e.g., short, medium, long) */,
  "wait_time_trend" TEXT /* Trend of wait time (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wait_time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wait_times_date_id FOREIGN KEY ("date_id") REFERENCES dates ("date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wait_times_attraction_id FOREIGN KEY ("attraction_id") REFERENCES attractions ("attraction_id")
)
